regulation_reference: SEBI ICDR Regulations 2018, Chapter IX, Schedule VI, Part A, Clause 10
description: Basic financial figures for the last 3 financial years, entered once and referenced by other sections for cross-checks. These figures must be consistent with the audited financial statements included in the DRHP.

financial_year.label: Financial Year
financial_year.icdr_text: Financial statements for the last three completed financial years.

revenue.label: Revenue from Operations (₹ in Lakhs)
revenue.icdr_text: Statement of Revenue from Operations as per the audited financial statements.
revenue.help_text: Total revenue from operations as per the audited Profit & Loss statement.

ebitda.label: EBITDA (₹ in Lakhs)
ebitda.icdr_text: Operating profit before interest, depreciation, and tax.
ebitda.help_text: Earnings Before Interest, Taxes, Depreciation, and Amortization.

pat.label: Profit After Tax (₹ in Lakhs)
pat.icdr_text: Net profit after tax as per the audited financial statements.
pat.help_text: Net profit after tax as per the audited P&L statement.

net_worth.label: Net Worth (₹ in Lakhs)
net_worth.icdr_clause: Schedule VI, Part A, Clause 10(e), read with Regulation 229(2)(b)
net_worth.icdr_text: Net worth of the issuer as per the latest audited financial statements. For SME IPO, net worth shall be at least ₹1 crore as per the latest audited financial statements.
net_worth.help_text: Net worth as per the Balance Sheet (Share Capital + Reserves - Miscellaneous Expenditure).

notes: SME eligibility: Net worth must be positive and at least ₹1 crore (Regulation 229(2)(b)).
Track record: The issuer must have operating profit (EBITDA) from operations for at least 2 out of the 3 preceding financial years (Regulation 229(2)(d)).
All figures must match the restated audited financial statements.
These figures are used as cross-reference points by other sections (e.g., RPT materiality thresholds are computed against revenue/net worth).
